scripts.postbuild: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const src='dist'; const pluginRoot='/Users/samdagreat/Documents/orca/plugins/orca-srs'; const dst=path.join(pluginRoot,'dist'); if (!fs.existsSync(src)) { console.error('[postbuild] missing source:', src); process.exit(1); } fs.mkdirSync(pluginRoot, { recursive: true }); fs.rmSync(dst, { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync(src, dst, { recursive: true }); console.log('[postbuild] copied', src, '->', dst);"
